spans.content: b) For any finite complex value
f \in C ^ { 1 } ( \mathbf { R } ) , f ( x + 1 ) = f ( x )
| | f | | _ {\infty} \leq \int_ {0} ^ {1} | f (t) | d t + \int_ {0} ^ {1} | f ^ {\prime} (t) | d t.
. Study the Lyapunov stability of the
\begin{array} { r } { f \in L ^ { 1 } [ 0 , 2 \pi ] , \hat { f } ( n ) = \frac { 1 } { 2 \pi } \int _ { 0 } ^ { 2 \pi } f ( x ) e ^ { - i n x } d x } \end{array}
S.-T. Yau College Student Mathematics Contests 2010
